economic_notes: Consolidated entities include Tk'emlups te Secwepemc Social Housing Section 95 Phases 1-13, Tk'emlups te Secwepemc Social Housing Section 95 Phases 14-20, and Spiyu7ullucw Ranch Corporation. Government business enterprises include Kamloops Indian Band Development Corporation, Kamloops Indian Band Utility Corporation, Kukpi7 Ciexlixqen te Eyksem Holdings, Secwepemcetkwe Enterprises Ltd., and Tk'emlupsmc Forestry Limited Partnership.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified due to tangible capital asset amortization policy for Canada Mortgage and Housing tangible capital assets being amortized at annual principal reduction rate rather than estimated useful life. Additionally, Government Business Enterprises prepared using ASPE rather than IFRS, so TteS was unable to determine impact of departure on GBE income and accumulated surplus. Consolidation includes non-coterminous fiscal period for Spiyu7ullucw Ranch Corporation (April 1, 2021 to January 31, 2022). Total government transfers calculated as ISC + Province of BC + CMHC + Health Canada = 10,990,726 + 6,751,454 + 212,313 + 813,877 = 18,768,370 (Note: used 18,654,593 excluding Health Canada from revenue lines as Health Canada shown separately). OSR calculated as total revenue minus government transfers.
